description: Stacked bar chart driven by DuckDB SQL query.

sql.description: DuckDB SQL query with {{udf_name}} and $param_name placeholders. Must return 'label', 'series', and 'value' columns.

showGrid.description: Show subtle grid lines behind bars.

xAxisFontSize.description: X-axis label font size in pixels.

yAxisFontSize.description: Y-axis label font size in pixels.

beginAtZero.description: Force value axis to start at 0.

animationMs.description: Animation duration in milliseconds. 0 disables animation. Animation only plays on data changes, not on zoom/resize.

style.description: Inline CSS styles as a plain CSS string.
